headline: Bloom Energy’s AEP Deal Links Fuel Cells To AI Demand And Valuation
summary: Bloom Energy (NYSE:BE) has signed a record 1 GW fuel cell supply agreement with American Electric Power. The deal focuses on powering AI focused data center infrastructure across AEP’s footprint. This contract marks a major step for Bloom Energy in scaling its solid oxide fuel cell deployments. For investors watching NYSE:BE, this contract directly links Bloom Energy’s technology to demand from AI data centers. The company’s shares trade at $160.13, with returns of 18.1% over the past week...
